idea-plugin.name: SVG Toolkit
idea-plugin.description:
SVG Toolkit - Comprehensive SVG inspection and export for IntelliJ IDEA

Core Features

  • Smart SVG Detection - Finds data:image/svg+xml;base64,... strings in code (handles line breaks, charset, multiple encodings)
  • Gutter Icon Preview - Shows 16×16px preview icon in editor margin
  • Full-Size Preview - Click icon to open enhanced preview dialog with toolbar
  • Zoom Controls - 10%-400% zoom with keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+±, Ctrl+0)
  • Copy as PNG - One-click clipboard copy (works in Slack, email, design tools)
  • Export to File - Save rendered SVG as PNG file
  • LRU Image Cache - Caches rendered images for ~50x faster duplicate loading
  • User Settings - Configure MAX_INLINE_SIZE (default 200 KB)

Version 1.1.0 | Compatible: IntelliJ 2023.1+ | Author: Pramod Khalkar
